title: TestData
description: TestData: Defines input data and expected output data for one run of a particular unit test.

Inputs.description: Inputs to the method. Inputs are matched based on index in the list, i.e. index 0 in this list will be used as the first parameter of the method tested.

Outputs.description:
The expected outputs from the method for the provided inputs.
The length of this collection will only be greater than one if the method being tested returns an Output<T1,..,Tn>, for which the indices will match the ones of the Output<>.
This means methods returning a collection will be seen as returning one object, where the object is the collection.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
